permissions.projects.read: View all customer projects and quotations
permissions.projects.update: Update project details, notes and status
permissions.notifications.send: Send project email or SMS notifications
permissions.inventory.write: Create, update and delete stock inventory
permissions.equipment.write: Create, update and delete calculator equipment
permissions.users.read: View registered users and assigned roles
permissions.users.sessions.revoke: Revoke all active sessions for a user
permissions.audit.read: View security, role-change and session-revocation audit records

customer.label: Customer
customer.description: Can use the calculator and access only their own quotations and projects.

analyst.label: Analyst
analyst.description: Read-only access to projects, inventory, equipment and business analytics.

inventory_manager.label: Inventory Manager
inventory_manager.description: Manages stock inventory and calculator equipment without project, analytics or user administration access.

project_manager.label: Project Manager
project_manager.description: Manages quotations, projects, project payments, documents and customer notifications.

admin.label: Administrator
admin.description: Full operational and security administration access.
